headline: Is Moderna (MRNA) Pricing Too High After Its Recent 70% Year To Date Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether Moderna's share price really reflects what the business is worth today, you are not alone. That is exactly what this article will unpack. The stock recently closed at US$52.52, with a 22.8% return over the last 30 days, a 70.2% return year to date, and a 47.5% return over 1 year, set against a 62.0% decline over 3 years and a 61.7% decline over 5 years. Recent headlines around Moderna have focused on its position among major vaccine and biotech names and on how...
